generation_text_note: Contains full model output (code, reasoning, short answers) depending on dataset. ARC=1-letter, TriviaQA=short, HumanEval/MATH=long code+reasoning.

logits_file_shape_dtype.interpretation: Flattened layer-25 hidden states (misnamed as __logits.npy). Identical values to _layer_25.npy after reshape.

reason: No token logprobs or token entropies exist in JSON metadata. __logits.npy files are misnamed layer-25 hidden states (not logits). However, full generation text IS available in generated_answer field (varies by dataset: ARC=single-letter, TriviaQA=short, HumanEval/MATH=long code+reasoning). Behavioral T7/T8 can proceed using generated_answer text for analysis, but cannot use token-level logprobs/entropies. Hidden states (layer 5-31) are available for geometric analysis.
recommendation: Proceed with T7/T8 using generated_answer text as behavioral signal. Skip any token-logprob-based analyses. Use hidden states for geometric uncertainty geometry.
